note: Generic, config-driven tax-rebate deals. Unlike data/tax/deals.json (Ireland-only, keyed by host country code), a deal here fully specifies BOTH sides: a homeCountry (whose citizens' factories are scanned) and a hostCountry/coverage (which of those factories count). Add a deal by adding an entry here — no code changes required. Each deal logs independently once/day via deal_log.py into data/tax/deal_logs/<id>.json. `enabled: false` deals are held for review and never logged.
